name: PageIndex NotebookLM — Vectorless Tree-Structured RAG
description: Upload any PDF and chat with it using vectorless, tree-structured RAG powered entirely by Lamatic AI flows. No vector database, no external Python server, no chunking — just a hierarchical document index built from the table of contents.

steps.description: Upload PDF → build hierarchical tree index → save to Supabase
Tree-navigated search → page content fetch → LLM answer
List all uploaded documents from Supabase
Get full tree JSON for a document or delete a document

features: PDF upload with drag-and-drop or URL
Interactive tree viewer with node highlighting
Source retrieval with page ranges and LLM reasoning
